name: dev-agent-teams
description: Multi-agent development pipeline: investigate → design → implement → review → PR

dashboardApp.title: Dashboard app directory
dashboardApp.description: Absolute path to a local clone of the dashboard app repo (https://github.com/naut1402/agent-workflow). The /dev-dashboard skill clones it here, and the dev-team-dashboard MCP server runs from it. Recommended: an absolute path (e.g. /home/you/.dev-team-dashboard/app) — '~' is not expanded when used as the MCP command argument.

dashboardHome.title: Dashboard registry home
dashboardHome.description: Directory holding the multi-project registry (projects.json) and runners.json. Leave empty to use the server default (~/.dev-team-dashboard).

dashboardServerUrl.title: Remote dashboard URL
dashboardServerUrl.description: Base URL of a deployed dev-team-dashboard server (e.g. https://dashboard.example.com). Used by dev-team-orchestrator for workspace sync and remote job submit (F0003). Leave empty for local-only.

dashboardApiToken.title: Remote dashboard API token
dashboardApiToken.description: Bearer token when the remote dashboard has DEV_TEAM_API_TOKEN enabled. Set once here — orchestrator and sync scripts read it from env.

dashboardProjectId.title: Default dashboard project id
dashboardProjectId.description: Project id on the remote dashboard registry (should match the git repo onboarded on the server). Used as default for /dev-team-orchestrator --remote.
